error_signature: Cannot access 'binding' due to security concerns
title: Access to 'binding' blocked due to security restrictions
symptom: When running a script in a Set node, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot access binding due to security concerns'. This error occurs unexpectedly after the script has been functioning correctly for a long time.
applies_when: Running a script in a Set node
not_this_if: Using an older version of n8n
root_cause: In n8n version 1.123.12, a new security restriction was introduced that blocks access to 'binding' in JavaScript code within nodes. This is to prevent potential security vulnerabilities associated with accessing reserved JavaScript properties.
fix_steps: Modify the script to use bracket notation instead of accessing 'binding' directly.
Alternatively, set the environment variable N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false in your Docker setup and restart n8n.
agent_instruction: Change your script to use bracket notation or adjust the Docker environment variable to allow access.
